title: How to get the weekday name from a date
task: Turn a date into its day-of-week name, like "Monday".
explanation: TEXT with the "dddd" format code renders a date as its full weekday name; "ddd" gives the three-letter abbreviation. July 20, 2026 falls on a Monday. If you need the weekday as a number instead (for sorting or logic), use WEEKDAY(A2) in all three apps.
